以下是 Chris Jericho 和記者 Chris Van Vliet 的訪談節錄：
　
Q1：為何選擇和 AEW 簽約？
　
『過去一年從新日本、All In 到海上巡迴
　
我意識到沒有 WWE 也是能過得好好的
　
然後我無法拒絕億萬富翁開給我職業生涯最大筆的合約
　
接下來的三年
　
我就是 AEW 的人了』
　
Q2：CM Punk 是否會加入 AEW？
　
『就我的理解
　
他不是自由選手
　
他是一位退役摔角手
　
當然，我們很想讓他加入』
　
Q3：Kenny Omega 加入 AEW 的可能性？
　
『一旦我簽了約
　
市場最大尾的自由選手就是 Kenny Omega 了
　
他何去何從？
　
我希望是 AEW
　
我真的希望
　
他的合約快到期了
　
我想我們就拭目以待吧』
　
Q4：和 AEW 簽約前，是否獲得 Vince McMahon 的許可？
　
『在簽約前有和他談過
　
他知道此事
　
我們和睦交談
　
他是我的朋友
　
我尊敬他、喜歡他
　
只是公事公辦
　
商業的道路把我帶走了
　
如果我沒簽那我一定是瘋了
　
因為我可能會羞辱到別人
　
我認為老麥是第一個同意這點的人』
　
Q5：Roman Reigns 的健康狀況？
　
『他正在接受治療
　
我認為進展順利
　
我對白血病了解不多
　
我不知道最後會怎樣
　
但當你做治療時
　
它會進入緩解期
　
你可以做運動、旅行或做任何其他事
　
我們和他談了很多
　
我和他有個群組
　
很常傳文字訊息給他
　
他似乎總是表現得很好、精神很好
　
我們愛他
　
我認為他回歸只是時間上的問題
　
但更重要的是
　
他肯定會為他的家人保持健康』

The Revival asked to be released after their match on WWE Raw

It has been confirmed in the latest Wrestling Observer Newsletter that The Revival asked for their release.

Following their match with Kalisto and Gran Metalik on Monday Night Raw, Scott Dawson and Dash Wilder walked to the backstage area and asked to be released from their contract.

WWE has not given them their release and, given their history when dealing with situations like this, it is unlikely that they will do so. The word in WWE is that nobody that asks for their release right now is expected to get it right now because of obvious reasons.

Those obvious reasons are the big money being offered by companies like All Elite Wrestling, Ring Of Honor and New Japan Pro Wrestling.

Dash Wilder hasn’t tweeted since Monday and last month, people in the company took notice of The Revival tweeting about a future match with The Young Bucks.

The Revival aren’t the only WWE Superstars looking to leave the company. Click here for news on Dolph Ziggler’s exit and click here for the latest on Mike and Maria Kanellis.

Kenny Omega represented NJPW alongside Kazuchika Okada, Tetsuya Naito, and Hiroshi Tanahashi at the Tokyo Sports Awards ceremony.

During his acceptance speech for Match Of The Year, Kenny acknowledged that this was 'goodbye for now', though someday he'd like to be there accepting the MVP award, he will not be on this stage next year.

Later that night, Kenny spoke to reporters about his future; “I can't tell you about my future schedule. As for AEW, I wish them good luck. Keep it up, it's going to be amazing. I am interested, of course, because it's a group of friends. Since I am a friend, I have no choice but to support them.”
